texto: Palaeontology is the Aladdin's lamp of the most deserted and lifeless regions of the earth
autor: it touches the rocks and there spring forth in orderly succession the monarchs of the past and the ancient river streams and savannahs wherein they flourished. The rocks usually hide their story in the most difficult and inaccessible places.
explicacao: Citação de it touches the rocks and there spring forth in orderly succession the monarchs of the past and the ancient river streams and savannahs wherein they flourished. The rocks usually hide their story in the most difficult and inaccessible places. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Palaeontology is the Aladdin's lamp of the most deserted and lifeless regions of the earth” articula reflexao, roy-chapman-andrews, on-the-trail-of-ancient-man em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como on-the-trail-of-ancient-man.
